title: Impact-First
description: High-impact, low-effort, realistic, and sustainable solutions that create immediate value.

title: Societal Progress
description: Improving access to knowledge, helping innovation, and making the world a better place.

title: Concrete Outputs
description: Creation of tools, APIs, and machine-actionable digital commodity. No interest in vaporware or 'just' reports.

title: Coolness Factor
description: Fun, exciting projects that align with passions and involve inspiring collaborators.

title: Virtual-Friendly
description: Work that can be performed remotely and does not require significant travel.
